name: RAG chatbot for company documents using Google Drive and Gemini
description: A RAG-style chatbot that answers employee questions using company documents stored in Google Drive. Searches Drive for relevant files, exports their content as plain text, and uses Claude to synthesize an accurate answer grounded in the document content. Results are posted to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: RAG chatbot for company documents using Google Drive and Gemini

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

question.description: The employee's question about company documents

folderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to search within (optional — searches all files if omitted)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Build Google Drive search query from the question
Search Google Drive for relevant documents
Select top files to fetch content from
Export each Google Doc as plain text
Compile document content for AI analysis
Build RAG prompt with document context
Run Claude AI analysis on documents
